examples: It was like eating butter redolent with raw garlic.
Underneath, visitors can stroll unaccompanied along a redolent sluiceway.
A second thing you can say about them is that they seem redolent of meaning.
This venue, in the heart of the Merchant City, is redolent of both history and commerce.
The dark-toned cinematography, by Tom Stern, is as redolent of the past as old leather and walnut.
